name: Tomato and Basil Salsa
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato, onion, jalapeno, vinegar, basil, and olive oil in a bowl.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for up to 1 day.
4. Bring the salsa to room temperature before serving.
5. Serve any extra salsa in a bowl placed in the center of the table.
Yield: About 1 1/2 cups
